mission.title: buildpacks: Allow caching all layers in the remote registry
mission.description: Allow caching all layers in the remote registry. Requested by 5+ users.

steps.title: Check current buildpacks setup
steps.description:
Verify your buildpacks version and configuration:
```bash
pack version
```
This feature requires a working buildpacks installation.

steps.title: Review buildpacks configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant buildpacks configuration:
I probably wrongly was assuming that layers with `cache = true` in their `<layer>.toml` will be cached in the remote registry, in addition to local volume cache.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Allow caching all layers in the remote registry
steps.description:
## Summary Adds a `--cache-image ` flag that will push all `cache=true` layers to the `cache-image-name` image. This PR only supports pushing to a remote registry (so the `--publish` flag must be used as well). the `cache-image` will allow subsequent rebuild to fetch these layers ```yaml Adding cache layer 'paketo-buildpacks/maven:cache' Warning: Failed to export cache: committing cache: saving image 'index.docker.io/donthedinosaur/some-java-image.build:latest': failed to write image to the following tags: [index.docker.io/donthedinosaur/some-java-image.build:latest: PATCH https://index.docker.io/v2/donthedinosaur/some-java-image.build/blobs/uploads/21145335-2d37-4b98-8c76-2e2ff3a0f6cc?_state=REDACTED: unexpected status code 504 Gateway Timeout:

504 Gateway Time-out

The server didn't respond in time. ] ```

steps.title: Upgrade buildpacks to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade buildpacks:
```bash
# Check current version
pack version
# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/buildpacks/pack
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Allow caching all layers in the remote registry" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
## Summary
Adds a `--cache-image <cache-image-name>` flag that will push all `cache=true` layers to the `cache-image-name` image. This PR only supports pushing to a remote registry (so the `--publish` flag must be used as well).

the `cache-image` will allow subsequent rebuild to fetch these layers and speed up rebuilds.

Note that only remote cache images are supported at this time.
codeSnippets:
Adding cache layer 'paketo-buildpacks/maven:cache' Warning: Failed to export cache: committing cache: saving image 'index.docker.io/donthedinosaur/some-java-image.build:latest': failed to write image to the following tags: [index.docker.io/donthedinosaur/some-java-image.build:latest: PATCH https://index.docker.io/v2/donthedinosaur/some-java-image.build/blobs/uploads/21145335-2d37-4b98-8c76-2e2ff3a0f6cc?_state=REDACTED: unexpected status code 504 Gateway Timeout:

504 Gateway Time-out

The server didn't respond in time. ]
